section_name: Pecuniary Interest in Certain Contracts Prohibited
text: A district employee may not have a direct or indirect pecuniary interest in any contract or agreement to which the district is a party.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.110 — Pecuniary Interest in Certain Contracts Prohibited

A district employee may not have a direct or indirect pecuniary interest in any contract or agreement to which the district is a party.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A district employee may not have a direct or indirect pecuniary interest in any contract or agreement to which the district is a party.
